description_long: This object consists of a cluster of three stylized mushrooms growing from a circular, dark base. The largest mushroom stands centrally, with a tall, cylindrical brown stem and a wide, conical red cap adorned with numerous white spots. Two smaller mushrooms, each with similarly colored caps and shorter stems, are positioned nearby, creating a natural grouping. The caps are smooth and slightly glossy, with the white spots distributed unevenly across their surfaces. The stems are straight and taper slightly toward the base, with a matte, woody texture. The mushrooms appear to be growing from a flat, black substrate, suggesting a decorative or artificial setting.
description: A cluster of three red-capped, white-spotted mushrooms with brown stems, growing from a flat black base. The caps are smooth and glossy, and the stems are matte and cylindrical.
description_view_0: The largest mushroom is prominent, with its cap fully visible and the two smaller mushrooms partially obscured behind it.
description_view_1: All three mushrooms are visible, with the smallest mushroom clearly seen to the right and the medium mushroom to the left.
description_view_2: The central mushroom's cap is viewed from a slight angle, revealing the medium mushroom in front and the smallest one behind.
description_view_3: The grouping of all three mushrooms is clear, with the smallest mushroom to the right and the medium one to the left, all caps fully visible.
